---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature/capability is.

## Motivation & Genesis Alignment
- How does this feature support nodes or trust relations in Vaked Swarm (Genesis **7c242080**)?
- Why is it needed?

## Proposed Behavior / Command Interface
Provide examples of how the new CLI subcommand or option would behave (e.g., `ag declare ...` updates).

## Alternative Solutions Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup, or conceptual schema here.
